title: habenaria bilabrella
intro: Habenaria bilabrella, also known as the striped orchid, is a type of orchid plant that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Habenaria bilabrella include its ability to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Habenaria bilabrella can be made by infusing the roots and leaves in water or oil, and can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
